capabilities.name: Natural Language Understanding
capabilities.description: Ability to interpret and understand human language in a meaningful way.
capabilities.usage: Used for extracting intent, sentiment analysis, and summarizing text.
capabilities.constraints: May struggle with idiomatic expressions or ambiguous phrases.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: What is the sentiment of the following sentence: 'I love using this product'?

capabilities.name: Text Generation
capabilities.description: Ability to generate coherent and contextually relevant text based on given prompts.
capabilities.usage: Used for writing essays, articles, and creative writing.
capabilities.constraints: Can produce plausible but factually incorrect information.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Write a short story about a time traveler visiting ancient Rome.

capabilities.name: Question Answering
capabilities.description: Ability to provide answers to questions based on context or provided documents.
capabilities.usage: Used for customer support, educational purposes, and general inquiries.
capabilities.constraints: Dependent on the training data and may not have up-to-date information.

capabilities.name: Language Translation
capabilities.description: Ability to translate text from one language to another.
capabilities.usage: Used for communication across languages in various contexts.
capabilities.constraints: Contextual nuances and idioms may not always be perfectly translated.

capabilities.name: Conversational Agent
capabilities.description: Ability to engage in a conversation with users, simulating human-like responses.
capabilities.usage: Used for virtual assistants, chatbots, and interactive customer service.
capabilities.constraints: May lose context in extended conversations and can produce repetitive responses.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Start a conversation about the importance of recycling.

capabilities.name: Text Summarization
capabilities.description: Ability to condense long pieces of text into shorter summaries while retaining key information.
capabilities.usage: Used for summarizing articles, reports, and text documents.
capabilities.constraints: Summaries might omit critical details or misrepresent the original text.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Summarize the following article about climate change.

capabilities.name: Sentiment Analysis
capabilities.description: Ability to determine the emotional tone behind a body of text.
capabilities.usage: Used for gauging customer feedback, social media monitoring, and market research.
capabilities.constraints: Mixed sentiments can lead to ambiguity, and sarcasm may not be detected.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Analyze the sentiment of this review: 'The product is good, but the delivery was late.'

capabilities.name: Image Captioning
capabilities.description: Ability to generate descriptive captions for images based on their content.
capabilities.usage: Used in accessibility tools, social media, and image galleries.
capabilities.constraints: May not interpret complex or abstract images accurately.
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Provide a caption for the image of a cat sitting on a windowsill.

tools.name: Text Generation AI
tools.description: A model for generating human-like text based on the input provided.
tools.usage: Used to create text for articles, stories, and conversational agents.

required parameters.prompt: The starting text to generate from.
required parameters.max_tokens: The maximum number of tokens to generate.

optional parameters.presence_penalty: Increases likelihood of introducing new concepts (0-2)

tools.constraints: Limited by max token output based on plan; may require internet access.

example-prompt-to-call.prompt: Once upon a time in a land far away,

tools.name: Image Recognition AI
tools.description: A model capable of identifying objects, people, and scenes in images.
tools.usage: Used for tagging images, and powering visual search in applications.

required parameters.image: The input image in supported format (JPEG, PNG, etc.)

tools.constraints: Performance may vary based on image quality and size; requires image preprocessing.

tools.name: Sentiment Analysis AI
tools.description: A model designed to determine the sentiment expressed in a piece of text.
tools.usage: Used to gauge public opinion in social media, customer feedback, and reviews.

optional parameters.language: Specifies the language of the text (e.g., 'en' for English)

tools.constraints: Accuracy can be affected by language and context; limited to predefined languages.
